svg.desc: Component: Settings Page (General + Providers and Models + MCP Servers tabs) Page: /settings Design system version: 3.6 (2026-03-23) Artboards: desktop 1440px — Frame 1 (General) y=0, Frame 2 (Providers and Models) y=900, Frame 3 (MCP Servers) y=1780

g.text: Enable verbose debug output in server logs. Use only in development.
Log additional detail for every agent step and API call.
Automatically rewrite user prompts to improve agent reasoning quality.
Run independent tool calls concurrently to reduce latency.
Compress older context to stay within the model's context window.
Action column header and all "Switch to" buttons are hidden.
Health "Check" button on Providers table also hidden for non-admins.
